name: loop-it
description: Write, choose, and launch verifier-gated coding loops for AI agents.

interface.shortDescription: Write, choose, and launch agent loops.
interface.longDescription: Loop it packages a portable loop writer, library, launcher, and Agent Skill that helps Codex turn open-ended work into a goal, verifier gate, proven loop pattern, host launch prompt, bounded passes, stop conditions, approval gates, and evidence logs.
defaultPrompt: Use $loop-it to create a verified bug-fix loop.
Use $loop-it to design a docs sweep loop.
Use $loop-it to run one bounded repair pass.
